story_title: Fix Silent Notification Failures on Android 14
description: Resolve the issue where push notifications fail to deliver on Android 14 devices, affecting user engagement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user on Android 14 WHEN they receive a notification THEN the notification should be delivered successfully without silent failures.

description: Optimize the notification delivery system to reduce the 95th percentile latency from 340ms to under 200ms.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a notification is sent WHEN measured THEN the delivery latency should be less than 200ms for 95% of notifications.

description: Implement a three-tier priority system for notifications (urgent, normal, low) to help users distinguish between critical alerts and routine updates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives notifications WHEN they are categorized by priority THEN the user can see notifications marked as urgent, normal, or low.

story_title: Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories
description: Create a settings page where users can opt in/out of specific notification categories such as marketing, product updates, and social notifications.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the notification settings page WHEN they select notification categories THEN their preferences are saved and reflected in the notifications they receive.

story_title: Collect User Feedback on Notification Preferences
description: Implement a system to gather user feedback regarding their preferences for notification types and timings.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user interacts with the feedback system WHEN they provide their preferences THEN the feedback is recorded and can be analyzed.

description: Set up monitoring and alerting for notification delivery performance metrics to ensure compliance with service level objectives.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification delivery system is active WHEN performance metrics are collected THEN alerts are triggered if latency exceeds defined thresholds.

description: Enhance the notification center to address accessibility concerns, ensuring it is navigable for users with disabilities.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with disabilities accesses the notification center WHEN they navigate THEN they can do so without barriers.

description: Develop a machine learning model to batch low-priority notifications and deliver them at optimal times based on user engagement patterns.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user has low-priority notifications WHEN the ML model processes them THEN the user receives a batch of notifications at an optimal time.

description: Conduct experiments to test different notification timing strategies based on user engagement patterns to maximize click-through rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN different notification timings are tested WHEN user engagement is measured THEN the optimal timing for notifications is identified.

description: Create compliance documentation for the notification system, including accessibility and privacy considerations.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification system is implemented WHEN compliance documentation is created THEN it should cover all necessary legal and regulatory aspects.
